title: vicia lens
intro: Vicia lens, also known as the lentil or blue vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia lens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Vicia lens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile option for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
